# Edxrf

**Summary**: A non-destructive method for determining the elemental composition of materials.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2011-al-dossary|Al-Dossary, 2011]] used EDXRF to determine the chemical composition (CaO, SiO2) of cement samples.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Cement samples after initial curing mainly consist of 60% CaO and 19% SiO2 by weight. ([[2011-al-dossary|Al-Dossary, 2011, p. 102]])
